title: Dog & Field 1/2lb Dog Training Dummies - Blue. Canvas Training Dummy With Short & Long Throw Toggle For Gundog & Puppy Training - Retrieval Practice & Gundog Training Equipment, Water Float Dummy
features: Gundog Training Dummies: Elevate your gundog training sessions with our range of Canvas 1/2lb Dog Training Dummies. The 1/2lb training dummy is available in 8 colour choices, and comes complete with both short and long throw toggle options.

Durable Canvas Construction: Made from 15oz duck cotton canvas, our training dummy is tough, durable and waterproof, ensuring long lasting use whilst giving the correct feel to the dog's mouth. Complete with a both a long and short throwing toggle, these durable canvas dummies are essential for developing your dog's retrieving and hunting skills.

Waterproof & Buoyant: This dog dummy is ideal for water-based retrieval practice, thanks to its waterproof and buoyant design. This dog training dummy floats effortlessly on water, making it perfect for retriever training sessions.

Gundog Training: Mimicking the size and weight of an actual game bird, this dummy for gun dogs helps your dog develop the necessary retrieval skills in a realistic manner. These canvas dummies are essential training accessories, offering a practical and effective way to train your dogs for hunting.

Versatile: The 1/2lb weight of this training dummy makes it easy to carry and throw, allowing for extended training sessions without fatigue. Explore our range of training dummies, including our; 1lb training dummy, 1/2lb dummy, 100g puppy training dummy, and realistic game bird dummies!
